error_notFound: Something went wrong and the page or resource could not be found!
udm_manage_data_description: Request account or data deletion for this app.
udm_deletion_request_description_1: Enter the email address associated with your account to request data deletion. We will send a one-time verification code to confirm your identity.
udm_deletion_request_description_2: Once confirmed, your request will be processed within 30 days in accordance with our data retention obligations. Deletions are permanent and cannot be undone. Some information may be retained where required by law or for compliance purposes.
udm_email_hint: Use the email associated with your account.
udm_delete_data_description: Your login remains active, but your personal content will be permanently deleted.
udm_delete_account_label: Delete my account and all associated data
udm_delete_account_description: This will permanently remove your login and saved content.
udm_deletion_warning: Warning: Deletions are permanent and cannot be undone. Some data may be retained for legal or compliance purposes.
udm_footer_text: This page is provided for {appName} on Google Play. Need help?
udm_alert_valid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
udm_enter_email_description: Enter your email address to receive a verification code.
udm_check_email_description: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to {email}. Enter it below to complete the process.
udm_verification_complete_description: A request was submitted to delete your data.
udm_error_no_code_sent: No code sent to this email.
udm_error_invalid_code_retry: Invalid code. Please check your email and try again.
